new_gaps_found: metric_hint must be validated as a metric selector, not arbitrary PromQL — reject boolean literals and comparison operators
threshold_value must be validated as positive — reject zero and negative values
FILL_IN markers must cause loud failure in promtool check rules — not silent broken alerts
alert_metadata needs condition_type: sustained | spike to correctly map lag to Prometheus for: duration
Prometheus adapter output must document application instructions for both standalone and Prometheus Operator environments
CDR must specify output path for generated alert files — turn_dir/alerts/ vs mpp/patterns/alerts/
